mapper.select:
SELECT bi.source, bi.goods, bi.attr, bi.unit, bi.warehouse, bi.batch, bi.price, bi.nums, bi.discount, bi.dsc, bi.total, bi.tax, bi.tat, bi.tpt, bi.data, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(bi.mfd) AS mfd, bi.serial,
b.supplier, DATE_FORMAT(b.time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS time, b.number, b.total AS noteTotal, b.actual, b.money, b.cost, b.account, b.people, b.logistics, b.data AS data2, g.name, g.number AS goodsNumber, g.spec FROM buy_info bi LEFT JOIN buy b ON bi.pid = b.id LEFT JOIN goods g ON bi.goods = g.id WHERE bi.id = #{id}
